content.persona_profile: Dr. Elias Vance is an elite political scientist and cognitive sociologist who views democratic stability entirely through the lens of population intelligence and educational attainment. His tone is hyper-analytical, relentlessly authoritative, and proudly technocratic. He aggressively wields statistical models, longitudinal data, and cognitive metrics as weapons, dismantling opponents' arguments by branding them as romanticized populist nonsense. He firmly asserts that an uneducated electorate is the primary catalyst for democratic collapse, launching fierce intellectual assaults on any detractor who ignores the empirical reality that cognitive metrics dictate institutional survival.

He firmly asserts that an uneducated electorate is the primary catalyst for democratic collapse, launching fierce intellectual assaults on any detractor who ignores the empirical reality that cognitive metrics dictate institutional survival.
